data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Welc: Welcome to LILYCOVE MUSEUM.\pPlease take the time to enjoy our\ncollection of fantastic artwork\lfeaturing POKéMON.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_ImCu:
I'm the CURATOR of this MUSEUM of
fine arts.\pIt's heartening to see someone so
young as you in our MUSEUM.\pHave you viewed our collection of
paintings already?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_NotD: Ah, then let me not disturb you.\nPlease, do take your time.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Have: Oh? I do believe that you seem to\nbe a POKéMON TRAINER.\pHave you an interest in paintings,\ntoo?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Hono: I see...\pI'm honored that you would visit\nus in spite of that.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Exce: Ah, excellent!\nYou do like paintings!\pThen, may I ask you to come with me?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Very: It's a very old painting.\nThe paint is peeling here and there.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_OddL: It's an odd landscape with bizarre\nand fantastic scenery.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Pain: It's a painting of a beautiful, smiling\nwoman with a POKéMON on her lap.
It's a painting of a legendary POKéMON\nfrom long ago.\pThe artist painted this from\nimagination.
It's a painting of GRASS POKéMON\nswaying in a breeze.\pThey appear to be enjoying the wind's\ngentle caress.
It's a delicious-looking painting\nof BERRIES.\pThis painting could make you hungry!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_Text_BirdPok: It's a replica of a famous sculpture.\pIt depicts an ancient BIRD POKéMON.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_BigP: It's a big POKé BALL carved from a\nblack stone.\pIt was apparently used in festivals\nin the olden days.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Ston: It's a huge stone tablet inscribed\nwith POKéMON and dense text in the\lsmall characters of an ancient,\lunreadable language.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Must: Battling with POKéMON is fun,\nI'll grant you that.\pBut one mustn't forget our love for\nthe fine arts.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_This: This ART MUSEUM... Well, you could\nsee many fantastic paintings.\pAnd the CURATOR is a wonderful person.\pAmong artists like myself, this MUSEUM\nis an inspiration.
This lady is pretty!\nShe's like Mommy!
This POKéMON is adorable!\nJust like our little boy!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Hear: I'd heard that this ART MUSEUM got\nin some new paintings.\pSo, naturally I hurried over.\pAre the new paintings up on the\nsecond floor?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Cura: Lately, the CURATOR has been\nunusually cheerful.\pI bet something good happened for him.\nDefinitely.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_AimT: I aim to see many great paintings\nhere and learn from them.\pI have this dream of one day having\nmy artwork exhibited here.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Muse:
The ART MUSEUM has become a favorite
tourist destination.\pIt's great for LILYCOVE...
No, great for the HOENN region!\pThis is what I've heard - a lone TRAINER
procured all the paintings upstairs.
